reviews.author: Brian
reviews.text: Justin and Matt with Coastal Carolina Synthetic Turf recently did my entire backyard here at Sunset Beach. I never had turf in previous homes — once they installed it, I realized what I've been missing all these years. It is an absolutely amazing product. I'm extremely happy with the turnout and the zero maintenance and year-round green. My dog Eddie absolutely loves it as well. Extremely professional, great guys to work with. Would highly recommend.
